# Generated by ollama (qwen3-coder_30b)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

resources:
- name: vm-instance
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: zones/us-central1-a/machineTypes/e2-medium
    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/default
      accessConfigs:
      - type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT
    disks:
    - deviceName: boot
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        sourceImage: projects/debian-cloud/global/images/family/debian-10
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: default
      scopes:
      - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
    metadata:
      items:
      - key: startup-script
        value: |
          #!/bin/bash
          apt-get update
          apt-get install -y nginx

- name: cloudsql-instance
  type: sql.v1beta4.instance
  properties:
    databaseVersion: MYSQL_5_7
    settings:
      tier: db-f1-micro
      backupConfiguration:
        enabled: true
        binaryLogEnabled: true
      ipConfiguration:
        ipv4Enabled: true
        authorizedNetworks:
        - name: all
          value: 0.0.0.0/0

- name: storage-bucket
  type: storage.v1.bucket
  properties:
    name: my-app-bucket-{{ ENV['project'] }}
    location: US
    storageClass: STANDARD
    uniformBucketLevelAccess:
      enabled: true

- name: http-loadbalancer
  type: compute.v1.backendService
  properties:
    name: my-app-backend
    protocol: HTTP
    portName: http
    timeoutSec: 30
    healthChecks:
    - name: my-app-health-check
      type: HTTP
      httpHealthCheck:
        requestPath: /
        port: 80

- name: forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.forwardingRule
  properties:
    name: my-app-forwarding-rule
    ipProtocol: TCP
    portRange: 80
    target: $(ref.http-loadbalancer.selfLink)

- name: url-map
  type: compute.v1.urlMap
  properties:
    name: my-app-url-map
    defaultService: $(ref.http-loadbalancer.selfLink)
    pathMatchers:
    - name: all
      defaultService: $(ref.http-loadbalancer.selfLink)
      pathRules:
      - paths:
        - /*
        service: $(ref.http-loadbalancer.selfLink)

- name: http-target-proxy
  type: compute.v1.targetHttpProxy
  properties:
    name: my-app-target-proxy
    urlMap: $(ref.url-map.selfLink)

- name: global-forwarding-rule
  type: compute.v1.globalForwardingRule
  properties:
    name: my-app-global-forwarding-rule
    ipProtocol: TCP
    portRange: 80
    target: $(ref.http-target-proxy.selfLink)
